name: io.github.aidi1723/omniglyph
description: Local symbol ground truth MCP server for Unicode lookup, Lexicon Packs, World Protocol Packs, source-grounded guardrails, language-security checks, and audit evidence.

tools.name: lookup_glyph
tools.description: Look up one Unicode character in the local symbol fact base.

tools.name: lookup_term
tools.description: Look up a private or curated lexical/domain term.

tools.name: explain_glyph
tools.description: Explain one Unicode character using OmniGlyph Explanation Standard v0.1.

tools.name: explain_term
tools.description: Explain a lexical/domain term using OmniGlyph Explanation Standard v0.1.

tools.name: explain_code_security
tools.description: Explain Unicode source-code security findings using OmniGlyph Explanation Standard v0.1.

tools.name: normalize_tokens
tools.description: Normalize glyphs and domain terms into canonical IDs.

tools.name: list_namespaces
tools.description: List loaded lexical namespaces with entry, alias, pack, and source summaries.

tools.name: validate_lexicon_pack
tools.description: Validate an OmniGlyph Lexicon Pack directory with pack.json and terms.csv.

tools.name: validate_protocol_pack
tools.description: Validate an OmniGlyph World Protocol Pack directory with protocol.json.

tools.name: check_protocol
tools.description: Check Agent goal, action, output, or intent text against a World Protocol Pack.

tools.name: validate_output_terms
tools.description: Validate generated output terms against the local fact base.

tools.name: enforce_grounded_output
tools.description: Apply strict source-grounding policy to generated output terms and return allow/block decision evidence.

tools.name: scan_code_symbols
tools.description: Scan source code text for invisible Unicode controls, Bidi controls, and cross-script homoglyph risks.

tools.name: scan_unicode_security
tools.description: Scan source code text with developer-friendly Unicode Security Pack findings.

tools.name: scan_language_input
tools.description: Scan natural-language input for prompt-injection directives and hidden Unicode attacks.

tools.name: scan_output_dlp
tools.description: Scan model output for sensitive data and return redacted text.

tools.name: enforce_intent
tools.description: Apply an intent sandbox manifest and return allow, review, or block without executing commands.

tools.name: audit_explain
tools.description: Return an OES explanation together with audit evidence for actor, sources, findings, and unknowns.

title: OmniGlyph
